_meta.note: Only tables in 'schema' are local DB tables owned by this service. Everything under 'external' is accessed via MassTransit only — never create EF entities for them.

rules: Banner contains only a single image stored in wwwroot/uploads/banners
On create: frontend sends ImageFile, backend saves file to wwwroot and stores generated relative path in ImageUrl
On update: if a new ImageFile is provided, the old file must be deleted from wwwroot before saving the new one and updating ImageUrl
On delete: the physical image file must be deleted from wwwroot before soft delete is applied
Only active banners are shown in public endpoints (IsActive = true and IsDeleted = false)
Brand has a single logo image stored in wwwroot/uploads/brands
On create: ImageFile is uploaded from frontend, saved physically in wwwroot, and ImageUrl stores relative path
On update: replacing image requires deleting old file from wwwroot before saving new one
On delete: associated image file must be removed from wwwroot before soft delete is applied
Brands are used for filtering products and must always return only active non-deleted records in public APIs
Partner has a single logo image stored in wwwroot/uploads/partners
On create: frontend sends ImageFile, backend stores file in wwwroot and saves relative path in ImageUrl
On update: old image must be deleted from wwwroot if a new image is uploaded
On delete: image file must be physically removed before soft deletion
Partners are displayed only when IsActive = true and IsDeleted = false
